scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 180 Ringing Via: [$invVia] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [$invCSeq] Supported:replaces, timer Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655766 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress Via: [$invVia] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [$invCSeq] Supported: replaces, timer Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655766 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via: [$invVia] [last_Record-Route:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [$invCSeq] Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=user1 53655766 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 101 111 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=rtpmap:111 X-nt-inforeq/8000 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv

UPDATE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 UPDATE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
